calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Joseph M. Breall, Esq. for Plaintiff: National Cab Company, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Don Hirds, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Virgil Polit as follows:
Damages $17,147.53
Costs $862.00, for a total of $18,009.53
Judgment signed in open court.
